summary: Checked whether GitHub CLI or token setup is required before continuing the DinoBrain goal. Found gh CLI is not installed and GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN, and DINOBRAIN_GITHUB_TOKEN are not set. Existing HTTPS git remotes remain configured and prior push path works, so normal git commits/pushes can continue; GitHub Release asset upload or gh/API automation requires GitHub CLI login or a scoped token.
decisions: Do not inspect or store token values; only check token environment variable presence.
Normal git push does not require gh because existing HTTPS remotes and credential manager already worked.
GitHub Release upload, release asset management, repo visibility/API automation, and private no-Git installer downloads require gh auth or a scoped GitHub token.
next_steps: Install GitHub CLI and run gh auth login when release automation or GitHub API operations are needed.
Use a fine-grained token with contents read/write for clockmansy/dinobrain and clockmansy/dinobrain-data if browser login is not available; do not paste the token into chat.
